query:
SELECT c.id, c.duration, c.classification, c.status, c.teamMemberId, tm.name 
FROM calls c 
LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id 
WHERE c.duration < 60 AND c.duration > 0 AND c.classification != 'too_short'
ORDER BY c.duration ASC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT c.id, c.duration, c.classification, c.status, c.teamMemberId, tm.name 
FROM calls c 
LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id 
WHERE c.duration < 60 AND c.duration > 0 AND c.classification != 'too_short'
ORDER BY c.duration ASC
LIMIT 20;
